description: These floater sandals from lotto with black and light blue coloured straps are perfect for those who want to explore the great outdoors. Wear this with casual tees and bermudas or denims.UpperInterconnected ankle straps and midfoot straps with toe thong made of woven fabricAdjustable ankle strap with velcro fastening and adjustable midfoot strapCushioned rubber footbed stitched to the outsole with terraced grooves on footbedOutsoleTPU rubber outsole with patterned lugs for grip and tractionSandal careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
